issue: Generated resume not stored in jobs.generated_resume
impact: User cannot view/edit generated documents on the documents page
evidence: jobs.generated_resume is null despite documents_generated event

issue: Generated cover letter not stored in jobs.generated_cover_letter
impact: User cannot view/edit generated cover letter

issue: Generation used OpenAI (gpt-4o) instead of Anthropic Claude
impact: Fallback to different provider than intended; costs and quality differ
context: CLAUDE.md expects Anthropic; check isAnthropicConfigured() and fallback logic

issue: Regeneration blocked by session authentication requirement
impact: Cannot programmatically regenerate documents; only user in UI can trigger
context: Prevents automated testing and server-side retries

issue: MCP relay warning from relative URL server-side fetch
impact: Console warnings during generation; no functional impact
evidence: /api/mcp/relay fetched as relative URL from server component
context: Mentioned by user in E2E proof

issue: Generated documents not stored in generation_governance_runs
impact: Resume/cover letter content not accessible from governance audit trail
evidence: generation_governance_runs has no content columns (only verdicts)
context: Should documents live in jobs table, governance_runs, or domain_events?

issue: Quality gate stored in multiple tables with no sync guarantee
impact: Readiness state could diverge if updates are incomplete
evidence: quality passed stored in jobs.quality_passed, generation_quality_checks.passed, and jobs.status
context: CLAUDE.md: lib/readiness/evaluator.ts is canonical, but multiple sources could go stale
